summary: A Go monorepo currently undergoing an aggressive, AI-agent-driven test coverage improvement initiative.
concerns: Over-reliance on AI agents for test generation may produce brittle or low-value tests
Scattered agent output directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) indicate unmanaged artifacts
High volume of *_test.go files suggests potential test bloat or testing for coverage metrics rather than behavior
Untracked files in git status likely represent leftover agent generation artifacts
suggestions: Clean up or gitignore the GOrchestra/glm-agents/ directories to prevent repository clutter
Audit generated tests for actual behavioral value versus pure coverage inflation
Consolidate the 4 modified and 6 untracked files to stabilize the current working tree
Establish a review process for AI-generated test code to maintain quality standards
